plan_audit.message: no plan on disk; all 2 task-body-declared file(s) present

completion_promises.evidence: Updated guardkit/models/task_types.py DEFAULT_PROFILES to set tests_required=True for TaskType.TESTING. Updated docstrings to reflect this change. All 130 tests in tests/unit/test_task_types.py pass, including 7 new tests in TestTaskFixTp05TestingProfile class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Coach independently executes test files written by testing tasks
completion_promises.evidence: The coach_validator.py already has run_independent_tests method that executes when profile.tests_required=True. With tests_required now True for TESTING, the Coach will invoke pytest on test files created by testing tasks. No code changes needed in coach_validator.py — the existing mechanism handles this automatically via the profile check at line 1265.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test failures produce actionable Coach feedback
completion_promises.evidence: The coach_validator.py _classify_test_failure method (lines ~1480+) classifies test failures into categories (code, infrastructure, parallel_contention, collection_error) and produces specific feedback for each. This feedback mechanism is already in place and will apply to testing tasks now that tests_required=True.

completion_promises.criterion_text: zero_test_blocking remains False (don't block if no test runner available)
completion_promises.evidence: Updated guardkit/models/task_types.py to set zero_test_blocking=False for TaskType.TESTING. This ensures that if a testing task creates no test files (zero-test anomaly), it produces a warning but does not block Coach approval.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tasks that only create test infrastructure (conftest.py) don't false-fail
completion_promises.evidence: The coach_validator.py run_independent_tests method handles the case where no task-specific tests are found — it returns IndependentTestResult with tests_passed=True and a message 'No task-specific tests found'. This is triggered when _detect_test_command returns None. Additionally, zero_test_blocking=False ensures no blocking on zero tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test verifies the updated profile
completion_promises.evidence: Added TestTaskFixTp05TestingProfile class with 7 tests verifying all aspects of the updated TESTING profile. Also updated existing tests (test_create_testing_profile, test_default_profiles_testing_configuration, test_for_type_returns_testing_profile, test_get_profile_with_testing, test_workflow_testing_task) to reflect the new tests_required=True value. All 130 tests pass.
